personal.name: Nafij Islam
personal.title: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer & Shopify Expert
personal.experience: Working actively as a Frontend & Backend Developer and Shopify Expert since 2024. Skilled in modern web ecosystems and no-code/low-code tools like Bubble.io.
personal.about: Nafij is a passionate Developer and Shopify Partner who crafts highly performant, custom-tailored websites and e-commerce stores. He is dedicated to building clean, pixel-perfect user interfaces, custom Shopify Liquid templates, robust web applications, and fast Bubble.io mobile & web platforms. He focuses on client satisfaction, performance optimization, and clean typography.
